summary: Stable Vendor Auto-Approve Feature Complete - All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend Stable Vendors page verified with Config Panel, Diagnostics Panel, Auto-Approve Engine panel, vendor table, and vendor detail drawer all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing 17 vendors in preview environment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stable Vendor admin page fully functional. 17 vendors in system, TUMALOC is the only one meeting all thresholds when using default config. Auto-approve engine returns 0 candidates (correct - no pending approval docs in preview environment). Apply-suggested-thresholds endpoint works but changes thresholds to very strict values (100% automation rate required).

GET /api/stable-vendor/config.returns: All threshold configuration fields including min_documents_processed, min_automation_success_rate, etc.

GET /api/stable-vendor/diagnose.returns: Vendor diagnostics with total_vendors=17, currently_stable, checks_pass_rate, suggested_thresholds, vendors list

POST /api/stable-vendor/apply-suggested-.returns: Applied thresholds and reevaluation results (promoted/demoted counts)

GET /api/stable-vendor/evaluate/{vendor_.returns: Stability assessment with flag, score, checks array, reasons array

GET /api/stable-vendor/vendors/{vendor_n.returns: Full vendor detail with stability_checks, routing_impact, quality_signals

GET /api/auto-approve/diagnose.returns: Approval backlog analysis (0 pending docs in preview environment)

POST /api/auto-approve/dry-run.returns: Preview with would_approve=0, would_skip=0 (correct for 0 candidates)

POST /api/auto-approve/run.returns: Execution result with approved=0, skipped=0, force_mode flag

coverage: TestStableVendorConfig (2 tests): GET returns thresholds, PUT updates config
TestStableVendorDiagnose (2 tests): returns diagnostics, returns suggested thresholds
TestStableVendorDetail (1 test): returns full vendor detail
TestAutoApproveDryRun (2 tests): returns preview, respects params
TestAutoApproveRun (2 tests): executes approval, force mode works
TestVendorsList (3 tests): list, search filter, status filter
Auto-Approve Panel visible with all buttons
Vendor detail drawer opens with all sections

mocked_api_note: Microsoft Graph Email, BC write operations, JWT Auth are MOCKED
